member.name: T:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController
member.summary: KKAPI character controller that handles saving and loading character data as well as provides methods to get or set the saved data

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.TexDicSaveKey
member.summary: Under what name the controller's textures get saved in cards

member.name: P:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.CurrentCoordinateIndex
member.summary: Index of the currently worn coordinate. Always 0 except for in Koikatsu

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.OnCardBeingSaved(KKAPI.GameMode)
member.summary: Handles saving data to character cards

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.OnReload(KKAPI.GameMode,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Handles loading data from character cards

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.SetMaterialTextureFromFileByUpdate
member.summary: Used by SetMaterialTextureFromFile if setTexInUpdate is true, needed for loading files via file dialogue

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.OnCoordinateBeingSaved(AIChara.ChaFileCoordinate)
member.summary: Handles saving data to coordinate cards

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.OnCoordinateBeingLoaded(AIChara.ChaFileCoordinate,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Handles loading data from coordinate cards

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.CorrectTongue
member.summary: Corrects the tongue materials since some of them are not properly refreshed on replacing a character

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.SetAndGetTextureID(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Finds the texture bytes in the dictionary of textures and returns its ID. If not found, adds the texture to the dictionary and returns the ID of the added texture.

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.RefreshClothesMainTex
member.summary: Refresh the clothes MainTex, typically called after editing colors in the character maker

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.SetTextureWithProperty(UnityEngine.GameObject,KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.MaterialTextureProperty)
member.summary: Sets the texture indicated by TexID to texture of Material indicated by TextureProperty
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
TextureProperty with TexID to set for Material
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.RefreshBodyMainTex
member.summary: Refresh the body MainTex, typically called after editing colors in the character maker

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.RefreshBodyEdits
member.summary: Reapply all edits to the body and face

member.name: M:KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.MaterialCopyEdits(System.Int32,KK_Plugins.MaterialEditor.MaterialEditorCharaController.ObjectType,UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Copy any edits for the specified object
member.param: Slot of the clothing (0=tops, 1=bottoms, etc.), the hair (0=back, 1=front, etc.), or of the accessory. Ignored for other object types.
Material being modified. Also modifies all other materials of the same name.
GameObject the material belongs to

member.name: T:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes
member.summary:
Class that specifies how a setting should be displayed inside the ConfigurationManager settings window.
Usage: This class template has to be copied inside the plugin's project and referenced by its code directly. make a new instance, assign any fields that you want to override, and pass it as a tag for your setting.
If a field is null (default), it will be ignored and won't change how the setting is displayed. If a field is non-null (you assigned a value to it), it will override default behavior.
member.remarks: You can read more and see examples in the readme at https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx.ConfigurationManager You can optionally remove fields that you won't use from this class, it's the same as leaving them null.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ShowRangeAsPercent
member.summary: Should the setting be shown as a percentage (only use with value range settings).

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.CustomDrawer
member.summary: Custom setting editor (OnGUI code that replaces the default editor provided by ConfigurationManager). See below for a deeper explanation. Using a custom drawer will cause many of the other fields to do nothing.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Browsable
member.summary: Show this setting in the settings screen at all? If false, don't show.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Category
member.summary: Category the setting is under. Null to be directly under the plugin.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.DefaultValue
member.summary: If set, a "Default" button will be shown next to the setting to allow resetting to default.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.HideDefaultButton
member.summary: Force the "Reset" button to not be displayed, even if a valid DefaultValue is available.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Description
member.summary: Optional description shown when hovering over the setting. Not recommended, provide the description when creating the setting instead.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.DispName
member.summary: Name of the setting.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Order

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ReadOnly
member.summary: Only show the value, don't allow editing it.

member.name: F:KK_Plugins.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.IsAdvanced
member.summary: If true, don't show the setting by default. User has to turn on showing advanced settings or search for it.

member.summary: Class that behaves like a Dictonary[TKey,TValue]. Keys are held by weak reference; if a key is deleted by the GC, the Key-Value of that key is deleted.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.WeakKeyDictionary`2.SweepDeadValuesLittle
member.summary:
Sweeps dead values deleted by the GC from the dictionary.
This is an assumption that is regularly called from Update() and other functions. Clean only to the extent that it does not overload the system.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes
member.summary:
Class that specifies how a setting should be displayed inside the ConfigurationManager settings window.
Usage: This class template has to be copied inside the plugin's project and referenced by its code directly. make a new instance, assign any fields that you want to override, and pass it as a tag for your setting.
If a field is null (default), it will be ignored and won't change how the setting is displayed. If a field is non-null (you assigned a value to it), it will override default behavior.
member.remarks: You can read more and see examples in the readme at https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx.ConfigurationManager You can optionally remove fields that you won't use from this class, it's the same as leaving them null.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ShowRangeAsPercent
member.summary: Should the setting be shown as a percentage (only use with value range settings).

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.CustomDrawer
member.summary: Custom setting editor (OnGUI code that replaces the default editor provided by ConfigurationManager). See below for a deeper explanation. Using a custom drawer will cause many of the other fields to do nothing.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Browsable
member.summary: Show this setting in the settings screen at all? If false, don't show.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Category
member.summary: Category the setting is under. Null to be directly under the plugin.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.DefaultValue
member.summary: If set, a "Default" button will be shown next to the setting to allow resetting to default.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.HideDefaultButton
member.summary: Force the "Reset" button to not be displayed, even if a valid DefaultValue is available.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Description
member.summary: Optional description shown when hovering over the setting. Not recommended, provide the description when creating the setting instead.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.DispName
member.summary: Name of the setting.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Order
member.summary: Order of the setting on the settings list relative to other settings in a category. 0 by default, higher number is higher on the list.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ReadOnly
member.summary: Only show the value, don't allow editing it.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.IsAdvanced
member.summary: If true, don't show the setting by default. User has to turn on showing advanced settings or search for it.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ObjToStr
member.summary: Custom converter from setting type to string for the built-in editor textboxes.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.StrToObj
member.summary: Custom converter from string to setting type for the built-in editor textboxes.

Return Type: int pic1: WebPPicture* pic2: WebPPicture* metric_type: int result: float* result[5]
Compute PSNR, SSIM or LSIM distortion metric between two pictures. Result is in dB, stores in result[] in the Y/U/V/Alpha/All order. Returns false in case of error (src and ref don't have same dimension, ...) Warning: this function is rather CPU-intensive.
0 = PSNR, 1 = SSIM, 2 = LSIM

Compute PSNR, SSIM or LSIM distortion metric between two pictures. Result is in dB, stores in result[] in the Y/U/V/Alpha/All order. Returns false in case of error (src and ref don't have same dimension, ...) Warning: this function is rather CPU-intensive.
0 = PSNR, 1 = SSIM, 2 = LSIM

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPIsPremultipliedMode(WebP.Extern.WEBP_CSP_MODE)
member.summary: Returns true if the specified mode uses a premultiplied alpha

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPIsRGBMode(WebP.Extern.WEBP_CSP_MODE)
member.summary: Returns true if the given mode is RGB(A)

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPIsAlphaMode(WebP.Extern.WEBP_CSP_MODE)
member.summary: Returns true if the given mode has an alpha channel

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPGetFeatures(System.IntPtr,System.UIntPtr,WebP.Extern.WebPBitstreamFeatures@)
member.summary: Retrieve features from the bitstream. The *features structure is filled with information gathered from the bitstream. Returns false in case of error or version mismatch. In case of error, features->bitstream_status will reflect the error code.

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPInitDecoderConfig(WebP.Extern.WebPDecoderConfig@)
member.summary: Initialize the configuration as empty. This function must always be called first, unless WebPGetFeatures() is to be called. Returns false in case of mismatched version.

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPInitDecBuffer(WebP.Extern.WebPDecBuffer@)
member.summary: Initialize the structure as empty. Must be called before any other use. Returns false in case of version mismatch

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPConfigInit(WebP.Extern.WebPConfig@)
member.summary: Should always be called, to initialize a fresh WebPConfig structure before modification. Returns false in case of version mismatch. WebPConfigInit() must have succeeded before using the 'config' object. Note that the default values are lossless=0 and quality=75.

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPConfigPreset(WebP.Extern.WebPConfig@,WebP.Extern.WebPPreset,System.Single)
member.summary: This function will initialize the configuration according to a predefined set of parameters (referred to by 'preset') and a given quality factor. This function can be called as a replacement to WebPConfigInit(). Will return false in case of error.

member.name: M:WebP.Extern.NativeBindings.WebPPictureInit(WebP.Extern.WebPPicture@)
member.summary: Should always be called, to initialize the structure. Returns false in case of version mismatch. WebPPictureInit() must have succeeded before using the 'picture' object. Note that, by default, use_argb is false and colorspace is WEBP_YUV420.

member.name: M:WebP.Texture2DExt.ScaleToSize(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Scaling funtion to scale image to specific width and height.
member.returns: The to size.
member.param: Width in pixels.
Height in pixels.

member.name: M:WebP.Texture2DExt.ScaleBy(System.Single)
member.summary: Scaling function scale both height and width by a specific amount.
member.returns: The by.
member.param: Scale.

member.name: M:WebP.Texture2DExt.ScaleToWidth(System.Int32)
member.summary: Scaling function to scale to a specifc width while retaining aspect.
member.returns: The to width.
member.param: Width in pixels.

member.name: M:WebP.Texture2DExt.ScaleToHeight(System.Int32)
member.summary: Scaling function to scale to a specific height while retaining aspect.
member.returns: The to height.
member.param: Height in pixels.

member.name: M:WebP.Texture2DExt.GetWebPDimensions(System.Byte[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Gets dimensions from a webp format block of data.
member.param: L data.
L width.
L height.

member.name: M:WebP.Texture2DExt.LoadRGBAFromWebP(System.Byte[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Boolean,WebP.Error@,WebP.Texture2DExt.ScalingFunction)
member.summary: Loads an image from webp into a byte array in RGBA format.
member.returns: The RGBA from web p.
member.param: L data.
L width.
L height.
If set to true l mipmaps.
L error.
Scaling function.
